A.does: Walks the fiber's linked list of pending and deferred state updates, applies each update's payload to the base state, and writes the resulting memoizedState back to the work-in-progress fiber.

B.does: Resets all global render-loop state and creates a fresh work-in-progress alternate fiber tree rooted at the given FiberRoot, preparing the reconciler to start a new render pass.

comparison: prepareFreshStack is called once at the beginning of each render attempt (in performWorkOnRoot and error-retry paths) to set up the work loop, while processUpdateQueue is called per-fiber during that render pass to compute each class component's or root's new state from queued updates.
